name: plan-from-requirements-plugin
description: Adds a /plan-from-requirements skill that turns the requirements in docs/requirements/ into a concrete plan of GitHub issues — small-batch tasks named with staged numbering (1.1, 1.2, 2.1...), one milestone per phase, each issue carrying a clear Definition of Done and acceptance criteria. Identifies which tasks need a human (account creation, API keys, design decisions, legal review) and front-loads them into Phase 1 because humans are slower than AI. Uses a minimal label set (priority + type + human-required) and never uses labels for phases — phases are milestones.
